MOTION Notice Of Motion To Appoint Janice Jusino As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substotute Successor In Interest For, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File 1st Amended Complaint
Off Calendar May-28-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Raymond Mueller, Esq. of BRAYTON & PURCELL 898-1555, for petitioner Janice Jusino moving to appoint Janice Jusino As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, NICHOLAS Petropoulo, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File 1st Amended Complaint

RULING:
No other appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Petitioner Janice Jusino's Motion To Appoint Janice Jusino As Successor-In-Interest To, And Substitute Successor-In-Interest For, NICHOLAS Petropoulo, Deceased Plaintiff And For Leave To File 1st Amended Complaint -- Granted. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (PHA/301/JU) Reporter: Robert Balian, CSR #5220
